channel.title: CS-107 Object-Oriented Programming I :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: CS-107 — Object-Oriented Programming I 1 credit Working description Encapsulation, inheritance, abstraction, classes — modeling a domain and drawing boundaries. Moved from B2. Encapsulation as boundary-drawing (Boundaries & Contracts thread). To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
